info.name: Amazon Neptune Execute an OpenCypher Query via HTTP GET

items.docs: Submits an openCypher query via URL query parameter. Supports both read and write queries.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Execute an OpenCypher Query via HTTP POST

items.docs: Submits an openCypher query to the Neptune HTTP endpoint. The query is provided as a form-encoded parameter. Supports both read and write queries. Nodes are returned with ~id, ~entityType, ~labels, and ~properties fields. Relationships include ~id, ~entityType, ~start, ~end, ~type, and ~properties fields.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Get the Status of All Running OpenCypher Queries

items.docs: Returns the status of all running and waiting openCypher queries, including query IDs and execution statistics.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Get the Status of a Specific OpenCypher Query

params.name: queryId
params.description: The unique identifier of the openCypher query.

items.docs: Returns the status of a specific openCypher query by its query ID.

info.name: Amazon Neptune Cancel a Running OpenCypher Query

params.name: queryId
params.description: The unique identifier of the openCypher query to cancel.

items.docs: Cancels a running openCypher query by its query ID.
